## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence. If you need more, the PR may be too large. -->

## Type

- [ ] `content:` — content addition or edit
- [ ] `build:` — build system change
- [ ] `infra:` — project infrastructure
- [ ] `rule:` / `skill:` — agent rule or skill
- [ ] `spec:` — specification document
- [ ] `journal:` — failure record or evolution note

## Checklist

- [ ] One concern per PR — no unrelated changes mixed in
- [ ] Commit messages are atomic and prefixed
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Bilingual content has both `en.md` and `zh.md` (or marked as draft)
- [ ] No PII in any committed file
